description: A cinematic product/service reveal with interactive multi-phase animations, brand-themed transitions, and premium visual polish. Users tap through dramatic reveal stages culminating in a CTA.

colors.description: Brand color palette for all visuals and transitions

primary.description: Main brand color for backgrounds, glows, and CTA

secondary.description: Text, headings, and secondary UI elements

accent.description: Highlights, particles, badges, and shimmer effects

texts.description: All user-facing text strings for the reveal experience

teaserText.description: Teaser headline on the boot/splash screen

productName.description: Product or service name revealed in Phase 2

brandStatement.description: Brand statement or tagline shown in Phase 4

features.description: Feature badges displayed in Phase 3 (icon + text pairs)

icon.description: Emoji or single character icon for the badge

tapPrompt.description: Prompt text below mystery circle (e.g., 'Tap to Reveal')

assets.description: Brand assets mapped to reveal roles

product.description: Asset key for the main product/service image sprite

logo.description: Asset key for brand logo shown in boot and CTA phases

theme.description: Visual theme and animation style options

backgroundStyle.description: Background animation style throughout the experience

particleDensity.description: Ambient particle density across all phases

transitionStyle.description: Transition style between boot and reveal scenes

revealStyle.description: Style of the product reveal particle burst

featureCount.description: Number of feature badges to display (uses first N from features array)

autoAdvance.description: Whether phases auto-advance after a delay (true) or require tap (false)

autoAdvanceDelay.description: Delay in ms before auto-advancing to next phase (if autoAdvance is true)
